rows.label: tev066101_JNK0010
rows.name: Inquire

rows.label: tev066101_SEL0011
rows.name: Ask De Ezich about the other Larsians.

rows.label: tev066101_JNK0020
rows.name: Discuss

rows.label: tev066101_SEL0021
rows.name: Ask De Ezich about recent developments.

rows.label: tev066101_SEL0031
rows.name: Ask De Ezich about the Larsians.

rows.label: tev066101_SEL0041
rows.name: Ask De Ezich about recent developments.

rows.label: tev066101_SEL1011
rows.name: Ask De Ezich about life in NLA.

rows.label: tev066101_SEL1021
rows.name: Ask De Ezich about recent developments.

rows.label: tev066101_SEL1031
rows.name: Ask De Ezich about Ga Bewhe.

rows.label: tev066101_SEL3011
rows.name:
Ask De Ezich about the Larsians
who have moved to NLA.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev066101_SEL3021
rows.name: Ask De Ezich about recent developments.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev066101_MSG0001
rows.name:
Excepting outcasts like myself, Larsians are
a rigid bunch with nary a word to spare about
anything other than law, pride, or duty.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev066101_MSG0002
rows.name:
And they may not deign to spare
even that unless Prince Jiarg
has so given them leave.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev066101_MSG0003
rows.name:
Still, it is not wickedness
that drives them. Try not to
judge them too severely.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev066101_MSG0008
rows.name:
You are human, yes? Perhaps
you might oblige me.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev066101_MSG0009
rows.name:
I wish to learn more of this
town of yours. This...NLA.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev066101_MSG0010
rows.name:
What knowledge I do have was brought to me by
the Larsians who raided you. They say the town
is full of life and mirth and expression.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev066101_MSG0011
rows.name:
But I know too well that I cannot
go there to see for myself.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev066101_MSG0012
rows.name:
So perhaps you could delight me
with a tale or two? What say you?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev066101_MSG0017
rows.name:
Excepting outcasts like myself, Larsians are
a rigid bunch with nary a word to spare about
anything other than law, pride, or duty.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev066101_MSG0018
rows.name:
And some zealots would even
die for Prince Jiarg. They
must be out of their minds![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev066101_MSG0019
rows.name:
I, uh... I mean... Curses! I hope
my mother was not in earshot.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev066101_MSG0020
rows.name:
If she ever heard me speak such
words of the prince, she would beat
the life out of me on the spot.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev066101_MSG0025
rows.name:
Can you believe it?! Larsians and
humans are on the same side![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev066101_MSG0026
rows.name:
The Larsians who raided your
town told me all about NLA, and
I found myself enraptured.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev066101_MSG0027
rows.name:
My people have been left with nothing, you see.
The idea of a grand, gleaming spectacle of a town,
its myriad wonders mine to explore... Ahhhh![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev066101_MSG0028
rows.name:
But I fear I put all dreams of living
there aside, certain that my enemies
would never welcome me into their home.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev066101_MSG0029
rows.name:
Praise Prince Jiarg for proving me wrong! Now I
can ready myself for the day when I join my
fellows in NLA and breathe its intoxications in![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev066101_MSG1001
rows.name:
A fine day for me would start with a hearty meal at
Army Pizza, followed by a stroll past Belle Betty
Fashions to feast my eyes on the front lines of style.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev066101_MSG1002
rows.name:
In the afternoon, I would duck into the Sunshine
Café for a spot of tea and people-watch as the
city's many denizens go about their own adventures.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev066101_MSG1003
rows.name:
...Surprised? Heh heh. Never thought
you'd meet a Larsian urbanite, I wager.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev066101_MSG1004
rows.name:
They say Earth is a hundred times more
interesting than NLA. Is this true?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev066101_MSG1005
rows.name:
If you ever return, you must
take me with you! I just know
I am meant to live there.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev066101_MSG1010
rows.name:
I have been earning my keep working at bars as a
watchman—a "bouncer," I believe you call it? I
assure you, the money doesn't go to waste! Ha![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev066101_MSG1011
rows.name:
Perhaps I was wrong to regard my combat
training with such derision. It has presented
itself to be my most marketable skill here.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev066101_MSG1012
rows.name:
I need to thank my mother and father
for knocking some sense into me.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev066101_MSG1013
rows.name:
A letter and a rare local jewel ought
to express the sentiment well enough.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev066101_MSG1018
rows.name:
That wench? Why do you ask? ...Oh,
she got you, didn't she? Poor sap.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev066101_MSG1019
rows.name:
Ga Bewhe has always been something of a
backstabber. You need eyes on the back of
your head if you plan to deal with that one.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev066101_MSG1020
rows.name:
At least you are still alive. With a
treacherous woman like her, you should
consider that coming out ahead.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev066101_MSG1021
rows.name:
I do not know what she is up to,
but I guarantee she has more rogue
in her than I ever will in me.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev066101_MSG2001
rows.name: What a galling question coming from you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev066101_MSG2002
rows.name:
If you must know, the Larsians
who went to NLA are having
the times of their lives.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev066101_MSG2003
rows.name:
They get to be a part of your thriving
community, making equipment with Six Stars
or battling the Growth at your side.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev066101_MSG2004
rows.name:
The only ones left out of it all are me
and washed-up gaffers like Go Belg.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev066101_MSG2005
rows.name:
How unjust can the fates be, leaving
a young whelp as full of potential
as me to rot away in this pit?![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev066101_MSG2010
rows.name:
My days are filled with sparring and hours of
silent reading of the Larsian Book of Five Rings,
upon penalty of a thrashing from my mother.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev066101_MSG2011
rows.name:
Is this supposed to be
punishment or torture?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev066101_MSG2012
rows.name:
You have really done it to
me this time, "friend."[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev066101_MSG2013
rows.name:
Well, one day I will escape this hell
and make my way to NLA. Mark my words![ST:wait ]
